parts.name: Part 1
parts.instructions: You must answer this question. Write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.lead: Read this email from your English-speaking friend Chris and the notes you have made.

stimulus.head: EMAIL
stimulus.body:
From: Chris
Subject: We're moving house!

Hi!

Big news — my family is moving to a new house on the other side of town next Saturday! There are so many boxes everywhere, and my parents say we need all the help we can get.

Could you come and help us carry things? Afterwards we're ordering pizza for everyone!

Chris

bullets: agree to help Chris on Saturday
say what time you can arrive
suggest bringing something useful for the move
ask one question about the new house

parts.name: Part 2
parts.instructions: Answer one of these questions. Write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.lead: You see this announcement in your school English-language magazine.

stimulus.title: MY DREAM HOME
stimulus.body: If you could live anywhere — a flat in a big city, a house by the sea, a farm in the countryside — what would your dream home be like? Write an article and tell us. The best articles will be published next month.

bullets: where your dream home would be
what it would look like inside and outside
why you would love living there

tasks.lead: Your English teacher has asked you to write a story.
tasks.startSentence: In the empty new house, Maya opened the last box and started to laugh.

stimulus.body:
Your story must begin with this sentence:

In the empty new house, Maya opened the last box and started to laugh.
